title: koanophyllon thysanolepis
intro: Koanophyllon thysanolepis, also known as the "false yerba," is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Koanophyllon thysanolepis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal uses.
